command: agent1 patch_regression --case test_slh_dsa --case test_evp --case openssl_speed_sha256 --case perf_annotate_sha256_riscv64

tests.name: openssl_speed_sha256
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — expected IPC improvement from roriw

tests.name: perf_annotate_sha256_riscv64
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — expected roriw replacing sllw+srlw+or

summary: Add zba_zbb bit-manipulation extensions to linux64-riscv64 target. 2-line config change. zbb provides single-instruction roriw for SHA-256 rotations. Deferred to SG2044 for runtime verification.
